title: Unlocking the Secrets of Your Destiny with Saju Astrology
body: As I delved into creating the Korean four-pillars astrology calculator, I was amazed by how the 60 day-pillars interact with the five elements in shaping our lives. Each configuration tells a unique story that can resonate deeply with personal experiences. It's fascinating to see how even the smallest detail can reveal significant insights. Try it out for yourself at https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/en/ #Astrology #Saju #IndieDev #KoreanCulture #PersonalGrowth

title: Your zodiac sign is just the Sun — here's the deeper map
body: Western astrology reads only the Sun's position in your birth month. Korean Saju reads your full birth year, month, day AND hour — a far richer picture. I built a free tool that does both. Start with your zodiac sign, then go deeper: https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/en/horoscope #horoscope #astrology #zodiac #zodiacsigns #astrologytok

title: What your birth day reveals — the 60 Day Pillars
body: In Korean Saju astrology, the day you were born maps to one of 60 'Day Pillars', each a vivid archetype — like a great tree finding a deep well, or a flower enduring cold earth. I translated all 60 into English with full readings. Find yours free: https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/en/sixty-pillars #astrology #Saju #BaZi #FourPillars #ChineseAstrology

title: Today's fortune by your Day Master
body: Daily fortune in Saju isn't generic — it's read through your personal Day Master (the heavenly stem of your birth day) against today's energy. I made a free daily reading that does exactly that, in English. Check today: https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/en/today #astrology #dailyfortune #Saju #BaZi #divination

title: 사주로 나의 삶의 단계를 이해해보세요
body: 최근에 제 사주를 분석해보니, 각 인생 단계마다 겪는 어려움과 기회들이 정말 명확하게 보였어요. 나의 60주기와 오행이 어떻게 연결되는지 알게 되니, 앞으로의 방향이 한결 뚜렷해졌습니다. 여러분도 무료로 나만의 사주를 확인해보세요! https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com #사주 #인생단계 #한국점성술 #오행 #자기개발

title: 별자리 운세 + 사주, 둘 다 무료로
body: 별자리는 태어난 달의 태양만 보지만, 사주는 태어난 연·월·일·시를 모두 봅니다. 별자리 성격·연애·궁합부터 가볍게 본 뒤, 더 깊은 사주 일주까지 무료로 확인해보세요. 별자리 운세: https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/horoscope #별자리운세 #별자리 #사주 #운세 #궁합

title: 오늘의 운세, 내 일간 기준으로 정확하게
body: 두루뭉술한 띠별 운세 말고, 내 사주 일간(태어난 날의 천간)을 기준으로 오늘의 기운을 봅니다. 매일 갱신되는 무료 오늘의 운세를 확인해보세요. https://tarofortune.pythonanywhere.com/today #오늘의운세 #사주 #운세 #일진 #명리
